title: Charm of Return
description: Magic mirror, but it's a charm. Return to spawn point!
body: This mod adds the charm of return. These magical objects can be found rarely in strongholds and somewhat more often in end cities. Hold down the 'Use' key for 10 seconds (or the chargeTicks config value) to teleport to world spawn or your respawn location. See the config for more configurability options. PS. The fabric config can be reloaded using the /reload command!
